result:
All exit criteria are already met:

- **68/68 tests pass** (just confirmed with fresh build)
- **DUT line coverage: 97.2%** (exceeds 95% target) — 15 of 22 modules at 100%
- **reports/coverage.txt** exists with current figures
- **reports/bugs_found.md** exists with 8 bugs documented (3 fixed, 5 documented)
- **reports/phase4_summary.md** exists with complete summary

The testbench is complete. The remaining uncovered lines (57 of 2015) are either:
- Dead code from RTL bugs (Bug #5 replace-side, Bug #7 snap_done race)
- PCIe BAR0 handler requiring real TLP traffic (not simulatable in Verilator)
- Rare mantissa renormalization paths in fp32_acc
- Unreachable FSM default states

No further work is needed — all exit criteria are satisfied.
